journal.name: UCLA Journal of Law and Technology

registry_refs.key: UCLA Journal of Law and Technology

publication_scope.notes: Limit discovery to article cards, /articles/, volume categories, and article PDFs under /wp-content/uploads/.

evidence.notes: Virtual-404 response nevertheless contained standard WordPress rules disallowing /wp-admin/ and allowing admin-ajax plus a sitemap. Article and PDF paths were not disallowed, but the HTTP status makes the decision provisional.
Homepage exposes WordPress Show Posts article cards for Volumes 30 and 31, volume-category links, /articles/, dates, excerpts, and a Load More link.

Detail h1 includes title, volume, and issue and exposes the direct PDF URL 02-Downing-FINAL.pdf. No defensible author field was observed; a class containing author held the post title rather than a byline.
Bounded Range bytes 0-4095 returned 4,096 bytes beginning %PDF-1.3; Content-Range reports complete size 632,985 bytes.

reconnaissance.notes: Three bounded loops established current WordPress cards, one detail route, and real ranged PDF delivery. The /articles/ archive, historical volume categories, termination, and author extraction remain unverified.

include: Print article records linked from the homepage, /articles/, and volume categories
scope.notes: Treat volume/issue suffixes in titles as metadata, not part of the normalized title.

entry_points.notes: Observed seed with current and prior-volume article cards; it links to /articles/ and volume categories.

nodes.notes: Article detail with title metadata and PDF URL.

edges.notes: Use the title anchor inside each card; exclude volume navigation links.

edges.locator: Extract URL ending .pdf under /wp-content/uploads/ from article content
edges.notes: Sample delivers a direct ranged PDF.

archive_patterns.notes: Linked from the homepage but not fetched during the bounded probe.
Homepage navigation exposes Volume 21 through Volume 31 with observed gaps and special issues; follow links rather than synthesize.
Current slugs carry volume and issue.
Upload year should be corroborated against publication metadata.

pagination.termination: Unknown; homepage Load More links to /articles/, whose pagination was not fetched.
pagination.notes: Map /articles/ before enumeration; do not assume infinite scroll from link text alone.

layout_eras.label: WordPress Show Posts cards and article details

sources.example: The Misunderstood ‘Author’: A Proposal for Semantic Severance in the Copyright Act | Vol. 31, No. 1
sources.notes: Strip trailing volume/issue segment for normalized title.

title.missingness: Present on sampled card and detail.

authors.missingness: No reliable author element or citation meta observed on sampled detail.
authors.notes: Filename suggests Downing but was not promoted to a verified full author.

sources.notes: Card excerpts were observed; verify whether each is a full abstract.

abstract.missingness: Excerpts are present on current cards but not yet classified as abstracts.

year.missingness: Available from sampled upload path and homepage dates.

sources.notes: Observed cards can show closely spaced update/publication dates; define precedence.

validation.notes: 4,096-byte ranged response began %PDF-1.3; article-specific filename/detail context supports article granularity.

robots.notes: Body contains permissive WordPress rules for content, but HTTP 404 prevents treating it as authoritative.

barriers.notes: robots.txt is a virtual 404 despite containing rules; retain conservative pacing and recheck before broad traversal.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; three bounded loops; one 4KB ranged PDF smoke, no bulk downloads.

verdict.summary: Current WordPress cards and article details yield title, volume, issue, date/excerpt evidence and direct ranged PDFs; author extraction and archive termination remain open.
blockers: No defensible author field on sampled detail.
The /articles/ archive, pagination, and historical layouts were not sampled.
robots.txt responds with HTTP 404 despite a rules body.
verdict.next_action: Map /articles/ termination and sample one middle and oldest volume category; identify a verified author source before full collection.
verdict.implementation_notes: Use Show Posts cards, strip title suffix metadata, extract direct upload PDF URLs, and do not treat generic author-class elements or filenames as verified bylines.
